info.title: ZeroKP Age Verification API
info.description: Zero-knowledge proof based age verification service. This API enables privacy-preserving age verification without revealing personal information.

tags.name: Challenge
tags.description: Challenge creation, polling, and redemption for age verification

post.description: Creates a new challenge for age verification using PKCE flow. The origin must be pre-approved.

parameters.name: Origin
parameters.description: Origin of the request. Must be in the approved origins list.

parameters.name: X-API-Key
parameters.description: API key issued to the relying party.

Authorizer.description: Shared HMAC-based authorizer used by relying parties when calling the API.

keyId.description: Identifier of the client credential used to authenticate the request.

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) included in the canonical signing payload.

hmac.description: Hex-encoded HMAC (SHA-256) over the canonical message.

nonce.description:
SECURITY: Cryptographic nonce for replay protection (64 hex chars / 256 bits).
Required for nonce-based replay attack prevention (ASVS V6.1.3).

short_code.description: 12-digit numeric short code for accessibility (displayed as XXXX XXXX XXXX).

UuidV4.description: UUID wrapper constrained to version 4 values.

CutoffDays.description: Strongly typed wrapper around a cutoff expressed in epoch days.

get.description: Check the current status of a challenge

post.description: Complete verification by providing PKCE code_verifier

PkceCodeVerifier.description: PKCE `code_verifier` value constrained to the RFC 7636 character set.

UuidV4.description: UUID wrapper constrained to version 4 values.

CutoffDays.description: Strongly typed wrapper around a cutoff expressed in epoch days.

get.description: Returns detailed health status including subsystem checks for challenge store, nonce store, JWKS cache, rate limiter, and ban store
Returns metrics in Prometheus text exposition format

post.description: Endpoint for browsers to submit Content Security Policy violation reports. Returns 204 with no body.

get.description: Interactive API documentation rendered from the OpenAPI specification

post.description: Service-to-service endpoint for provii-verifier to create a verification challenge with PKCE. Authenticated via internal service token.

schema.title: InternalChallengeRequest
schema.description:
Internal challenge creation request (no authorizer required).

This is used by provii-verifier which authenticates via service token.

code_challenge.description: Required PKCE code challenge encoded as base64url 32 bytes.

method.description: PKCE method; only S256 is supported.

origin.description: The origin making the request (passed from provii-verifier).

verifying_key_id.description: Optional verifying key identifier validated against policy.

short_code.description: 12-digit numeric short code for accessibility (displayed as XXXX XXXX XXXX).

UuidV4.description: UUID wrapper constrained to version 4 values.

CutoffDays.description: Strongly typed wrapper around a cutoff expressed in epoch days.

get.description: Service-to-service endpoint for provii-verifier to poll challenge status. Authenticated via internal service token.

schema.title: InternalChallengeStatusResponse
schema.description: Response for internal challenge status check.

status.description: Duplicate of state for API consistency.

verified.description: True if challenge has reached Verified state.

proof_verified.description: True if proof has been verified (ProofOkWaitingForRedeem or Verified).

post.description: Service-to-service endpoint for provii-verifier to redeem a verified challenge using PKCE code_verifier. Authenticated via internal service token.

schema.title: InternalRedeemRequest
schema.description: Request body for internal challenge redemption.

code_verifier.description: PKCE code verifier (43-128 characters, per RFC 7636).

verified.description: Whether the challenge was successfully redeemed.

get.description: Returns full challenge details including short code, deep link data, and expiry. Used by the wallet app to display challenge information.

short_code.description: 12-digit numeric short code for accessibility (displayed as XXXX XXXX XXXX).

UuidV4.description: UUID wrapper constrained to version 4 values.

CutoffDays.description: Strongly typed wrapper around a cutoff expressed in epoch days.

get.summary: Look up challenge by short code
get.description: Retrieves challenge details using the 12-digit numeric short code (formatted as XXXX XXXX XXXX). Used for manual code entry as an alternative to QR scanning.

short_code.description: 12-digit numeric short code for accessibility (displayed as XXXX XXXX XXXX).

UuidV4.description: UUID wrapper constrained to version 4 values.

CutoffDays.description: Strongly typed wrapper around a cutoff expressed in epoch days.

404.description: No challenge found for this code

post.description: Registers a new origin for testing in the sandbox environment. Not available in production.

Required for nonce-based replay attack prevention (ASVS V6.1.3).

InternalChallengeRequest.description:
Internal challenge creation request (no authorizer required).

This is used by provii-verifier which authenticates via service token.

code_challenge.description: Required PKCE code challenge encoded as base64url 32 bytes.

method.description: PKCE method; only S256 is supported.

origin.description: The origin making the request (passed from provii-verifier).

verifying_key_id.description: Optional verifying key identifier validated against policy.

status.description: Duplicate of state for API consistency.

verified.description: True if challenge has reached Verified state.

proof_verified.description: True if proof has been verified (ProofOkWaitingForRedeem or Verified).

InternalChallengeStatusResponse.description: Response for internal challenge status check.

InternalRedeemRequest.description: Request body for internal challenge redemption.

code_verifier.description: PKCE code verifier (43-128 characters, per RFC 7636).

verified.description: Whether the challenge was successfully redeemed.

origin.description: Origin URL to register for testing

min_age_days.description: Minimum age in days (defaults to ~18 years)

api_key.description: API key for the test origin

ApiKeyAuth.name: X-API-Key
ApiKeyAuth.description: API key issued to relying parties

HmacAuth.name: X-HMAC
HmacAuth.description: HMAC-SHA256 request signature for expert verifiers

InternalServiceToken.description: Internal service token for service-to-service calls from provii-verifier
